root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) as member_group_name ,sum(sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock) as share_stock ,count(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as count_mem_share ,count(case when not exists ( select 1 from sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) then 1 end) as count_no_loan from sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_share_mem ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group
where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock > 0
group by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control
